title: Balen Defeats Oli
whyItMatters: The man who led the government that crushed youth protests lost his own seat to the face of change.

title: Gagan Thapa Loses
whyItMatters: Even the most popular face of the Nepali Congress couldn't survive the wave of change.

title: Ravi Wins Third Time
whyItMatters: RSP's chairman won with a huge margin, cementing his party's dominance in central Nepal.

title: First Victory Certificate
whyItMatters: She won with 15,455 votes and was the very first candidate in the country to officially receive a victory certificate.

title: Tech Activist Wins
whyItMatters: The famous champion of rural internet connectivity won as an independent, showing voters trust people over parties.

title: Economist Enters Parliament
whyItMatters: With 15,911 votes, one of Nepal's most respected economists joins parliament, raising hopes for data-driven policy.
